analysis_result: 108 peripheral nerve sheath tumor (PNST) samples were included in the MOESM4 Clinical Data table. Breakdown: MPNST=16, Low-Grade MPNST=3, Atypical_NF=21, Neurofibroma=35, Cutaneous_NF=33. All 108 have methylation; 49 RNA-seq; 54 WES.
discrepancy_analysis: Reported value (108) matches model value (108) exactly (0% relative difference). Within the ±10% concordance threshold.
